models.PlanningBox: Represents one of the three planning boxes in the Application Definition section - shows completion status and either prompts the user to run a command or displays generated markdown content.
models.Component: Represents an application component with name, type (compute/data/networking), and description.
models.ApplicationDefinition: The complete application definition containing all three planning boxes (overview, non-functional requirements, application components) with their content and completion status.

relationships: ApplicationDefinition contains three PlanningBox instances (overview, nonFunctionalRequirements, applicationComponents)
Each PlanningBox tracks whether it's completed and stores either null (not filled) or markdown content (filled)
The applicationComponents box contains an array of Component objects

planningBoxes.title: Application Overview
planningBoxes.content:
# Customer Portal

## Description
A self-service customer portal that allows users to manage their accounts, view order history, track shipments, and access support resources. The portal integrates with existing backend systems and provides a modern, responsive web experience.

## Purpose
Reduce support call volume by enabling customers to handle common tasks themselves while providing 24/7 access to account information and order tracking.

## Key Features
- Account management (profile, preferences, billing)
- Order history and tracking
- Support ticket creation and tracking
- Knowledge base and FAQ search
- Document download center

planningBoxes.title: Non-Functional Requirements
planningBoxes.content:
# Non-Functional Requirements

## Scale
- **Expected Users**: 50,000 registered users, ~5,000 daily active users
- **Concurrent Users**: Peak of 500 concurrent users during business hours
- **Growth**: Anticipate 30% year-over-year growth
- **Data Volume**: ~2GB current, growing to 10GB over 2 years

## Availability
- **Target Uptime**: 99.5% (allows ~3.6 hours downtime per month)
- **Maintenance Windows**: Acceptable during off-peak hours (weekends 2-6 AM)
- **Critical Period**: Business hours Monday-Friday 8 AM - 6 PM EST

## Security & Confidentiality
- **Data Sensitivity**: Contains PII (names, addresses, emails, phone numbers)
- **Compliance**: Must comply with GDPR, CCPA
- **Authentication**: Multi-factor authentication required for account access
- **Data at Rest**: Encryption required for customer data
- **Data in Transit**: TLS 1.2+ required for all connections

## Integrity
- **Backup Frequency**: Daily automated backups with 30-day retention
- **Recovery Time Objective (RTO)**: 4 hours
- **Recovery Point Objective (RPO)**: 24 hours (acceptable to lose up to 1 day of data)
- **Data Consistency**: Eventually consistent acceptable for order status updates

## Usage Patterns
- **Traffic Type**: Steady baseline with moderate spikes during business hours
- **Peak Times**: Monday mornings (8-10 AM EST), post-marketing campaigns
- **Seasonal Variance**: 40% increase during holiday shopping season (Nov-Dec)
- **Geographic Distribution**: 80% North America, 15% Europe, 5% Asia-Pacific

components.name: Web Frontend
components.description: React-based single-page application that provides the customer-facing interface for account management, order tracking, and support

components.name: API Backend
components.description: RESTful API service that handles business logic, integrates with on-premises systems, and serves data to the web frontend

components.name: Background Worker
components.description: Processes asynchronous tasks like sending email notifications, generating reports, and syncing data with external systems

components.name: Customer Database
components.description: Stores customer profiles, preferences, authentication data, and application state

components.name: Document Storage
components.description: Stores customer documents (invoices, receipts, guides) for download and reference

components.name: Session Cache
components.description: Distributed cache for user sessions, API response caching, and temporary data storage

components.name: Application Gateway
components.description: Entry point for incoming HTTPS traffic with SSL termination, WAF protection, and routing to backend services
